case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. SARA DE MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DE MARTINEZ, SARA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CRIS IBARRA--PRESIDENT AND ANNIA VELASQUEZ--ACTING ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE MARTINEZ, SARA $2,397.80 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,672.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
